name: Winter Exhibition
description: A collection representing cool color values, architectural stillness, and meditative moods.
curatorNote: Curated to express winter solitude, this collection highlights graphite drawings and monochromatic oil studies.

name: Golden Era Collection
description: Curations integrating gold leaf overlays and warm metallic accents.
curatorNote: Warm gold leaf details explore transitions of light on the physical canvas throughout the day.
